raw_action_dict.reasoning: Track curves left ahead but waypoint 67 is slightly right of current heading (delta=-5.42°), so a small -5° steering correction keeps the car on the waypoint line.

Car is consistently slightly right of center (~0.05-0.12m) but within safe margin
Full circuit ~17.7m, speed 1.5 is max and appropriate for moderate curves
